title: AgentDef Manifest
description: Schema for the manifest.yaml composition layer of an AgentDef agent.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent definition (e.g. "0.1.0").

description.description: Short human-readable description of what the agent does.

instructions.description: List of instruction file paths relative to the agent root.

skills.description: List of skill directory paths relative to the agent root.

workflows.description: List of workflow file paths relative to the agent root.

tools.description: List of tool definition file paths relative to the agent root.

input_types.description: Types of input the agent accepts.

spec_version.description: AgentDef spec version this agent targets (e.g. '0.5'). Optional; omitting it implies the oldest version the validating tool supports.
